description_long: This is a modern bathroom vanity set consisting of three main components: a tall storage cabinet, a sink cabinet with a vessel basin and faucet, and a wall-mounted mirror. The tall cabinet features multiple shelves and two doors, providing ample vertical storage. The sink cabinet has a rectangular base with two doors and a countertop supporting a round vessel sink and a single-lever faucet. The mirror is simple and frameless, mounted above the sink. The set is finished in a combination of dark and light tones, with metallic handles on the doors. The overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for contemporary urban interiors.
description: A modern bathroom vanity set with a tall storage cabinet, a vessel sink on a base cabinet, and a wall-mounted mirror in dark and light finishes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tall cabinet with shelves and doors, the sink cabinet with vessel basin and faucet, and the wall-mounted mirror.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the cabinets and the protruding vessel sink.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain backs of the mirror, sink cabinet, and tall cabinet.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the thickness of the cabinets and the vessel sink's profile.
